themselves say that the Vegas be<ome inoperative if they do not occur

18 and SO years are likely to yield much benefits.
The question may arise whether the operation of Yogas at
i'lappropriate ages is an act of destiny. The answer is in the affirmative,
since the basis of Hindu astrology hinges on the law of Kanna. It has
been found that many people will have lost their very good Vegas in
earlier d'lildhood and some have indications of enjoying them after 70
or 80. In between these periods, ordinary oasas operate and the man
may have to lead an iMignificant life bOth materially and mentally. Vet)'
few are destined to enjoy the fruits.
Here, of course. the arrangement is purely an act of God. By
aaangement it Is meant that the order of Oasa.Shuktis which may be
good or bad is God·determined.
